expand_windows.description: Window labels (W1, W2...) to expand UI trees for. Focused window is auto-expanded.

expand_data.description: Request full data. ref: 'cycle_N_typed', 'cycle_N_actor', 'clipboard', 'run_history'. range: [start_pct, end_pct] 0-100.

done_so_far.description: Factual progress: phases done, what failed, what remains. Produce at least 50 tokens.

next_step.description: Specific instruction for actor. Name element roles/names to find. Instruct chaining 3-5 actions. If stuck, mandate different approach. Produce at least 50 tokens.
